memberdef.definition: using faiss::simd_result_handlers::IVFRaBitQHeapHandler< C, SL >::RHC = ResultHandlerCompare<C, true, SL>
memberdef.name: RHC

memberdef.type: typename std::conditional< C::is_max, CMax< float, int64_t >, CMin< float, int64_t > >::type
memberdef.definition: using faiss::simd_result_handlers::IVFRaBitQHeapHandler< C, SL >::Cfloat = typename std::conditional< C::is_max, CMax<float, int64_t>, CMin<float, int64_t> >::type
memberdef.name: Cfloat

memberdef.definition: using faiss::simd_result_handlers::ResultHandlerCompare< C, with_id_map, SL >::TI = typename C::TI
memberdef.name: TI

briefdescription.para: these fields are used mainly for the IVF variants (with_id_map=true)

memberdef.argsstring: (const IndexIVFRaBitQFastScan *idx, size_t nq_val, size_t k_val, float *distances, int64_t *labels, const IDSelector *sel, const FastScanDistancePostProcessing *ctx=nullptr, bool multibit=false)
memberdef.name: IVFRaBitQHeapHandler

memberdef.argsstring: (size_t q, size_t b, simd16uint16 d0, simd16uint16 d1) override
memberdef.name: handle

detaileddescription.para: Set context information for handlers that need additional data
This method can be overridden by handlers that need list numbers and probe mappings (e.g., RaBitQ handlers). Base implementation does nothing since most handlers don't need this context.

parameterdescription.para: current inverted list number being processed
mapping from local query index to probe index

briefdescription.para: set the sub-matrix that is being computed

memberdef.argsstring: (uint16_t thr, size_t b, simd16uint16 d0, simd16uint16 d1)
memberdef.name: get_lt_mask

detaileddescription.para: return binary mask of elements below thr in (d0, d1) inverse_test returns elements above

memberdef.argsstring: (size_t q, size_t b, simd16uint16 d0, simd16uint16 d1)=0
memberdef.name: handle

detaileddescription.para: called when 32 distances are computed and provided in two simd16uint16. (q, b) indicate which entry it is in the block.

memberdef.argsstring: (size_t local_q, size_t global_q, size_t local_offset, const uint8_t *aux_ptr)
memberdef.name: compute_full_multibit_distance

detaileddescription.para: SIMD result handler for IndexIVFRaBitQFastScan that applies RaBitQ-specific distance corrections during batch processing.
